# Range Slider

## Description
Range slider wrapper built on top of noUiSlider.
## Installation
Install the package:

```bash
yarn add @enso-ui/range-slider
```
## Features
- exports `RangeSlider` as its public surface
- keeps the Bulma presentation layer separate from the renderless/stateful layer where applicable
## Usage
```vue
<script setup>
import RangeSlider from '@enso-ui/range-slider/src/RangeSlider.vue';
</script>
```
## API
### `RangeSlider`

Public export available from `./src/RangeSlider.vue`.

Props:
- `behaviour`
- `connect`
- `direction`
- `manual`
- `margin`
- `orientation`
- `step`
- `tooltips`
- `modelValue`

Events:
- `change`
- `slide`
## Depends On
- No additional Enso UI dependencies.
## Contributions
are welcome. Pull requests are great, but issues are good too.
Thank you to all the people who already contributed to Enso!
